title: Marketplace Manager - Spencer's Retail - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Spencer's Retail - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Spencer's Retail family as a Marketplace Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
